transcription.text: Introducing my new Panitos, featuring the Deli Trio and turkey, bacon, and cheddar, both on toasted ciabatta bread. Served in a no-mass bag, they're almost too easy to eat on the go. So here are a few Panidos and Panidons. Eating in a car, eating on a car. While tackling errands, while getting tackled by a guy named Aaron. While working on your website, while twerking at a construction site. Actually, I think that's a Panidoo. Try my new Deli Trio or turkey, bacon, and cheddar Panitos. Deliver.
